name: US Cash Advance
description_short: Oakland's 421 14th St location of US Cash Advance offers payday and title loans 7 days a week.
description_long:
US Cash Advance's Oakland location sits at 421 14th St, 2nd Floor, in the downtown district. This standalone storefront is open Monday through Friday from 8 AM to 9 PM, and Saturday and Sunday from 10 AM to 7 PM, making it convenient for working hours and weekend access in Oakland.

At this Oakland, CA location, you can apply for payday loans, title loans, and other short-term credit products. Call +1 510-781-9915 to discuss your specific financial needs or to get more information about application requirements and approval timelines.

If you're an Oakland resident facing an unexpected expense, this location provides fast funding options without the long bank approval process. Bring your government-issued ID, proof of income, and a valid checking account—most approvals happen the same day. US Cash Advance has served the Oakland community with straightforward lending.
pros: Same-day funding available for approved applicants
In-person service with extended hours (8am-9pm weekdays, 10am-7pm weekends)
Accepts all credit types including bad credit borrowers
Loan amounts up to $50,000 for bad credit loans (beyond typical payday limits)
Quick approval process reported under 45 minutes in-person
cons: Website does not disclose APR, fees, or specific repayment terms clearly
Operates as third-party lead generator, not direct lender—actual terms depend on connected lender
Customer reviews appear inconsistent and potentially generic (one review misattributes company name)
Limited online functionality (customers still encouraged to visit physical location despite online application mention)
No disclosure of typical interest rates or cost comparisons for transparency
best_for: Workers needing same-day cash for unexpected expenses (medical bills, urgent repairs)
Consumers with poor or no credit history who cannot access traditional bank loans
Borrowers seeking larger emergency loans ($5K-$50K) beyond typical payday loan caps
diagnosis: US Cash Advance is best for workers in immediate financial distress who have poor credit and cannot access traditional loans, particularly those able to visit the Detroit location for expedited processing. The primary caveat is that the company does not directly lend but connects borrowers to third-party lenders, meaning actual terms, APRs, and fees depend on which lender approves the application—this information is conspicuously absent from their website.
meta_description: US Cash Advance at 421 14th St, Oakland, CA. Fast payday and title loans with same-day approval.
